description: A paragraph displaying a person's primary role or job title on staff profile pages.

stories.name: LongTitle
stories.description: A role with a longer, compound title

stories.name: Group
stories.description: Multiple main roles shown together as they appear on a staff listing

notes: Appears on staff profile pages to display the person's primary job role. Text always varies across pages. Structurally identical to existing atoms DeptName and JobTitle but with the .mainrole class.
